script:
set +e
echo '=== alive ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== per-user CLAUDE constants ==='
grep -H '^CLAUDE\s*=' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== per-user model lines ==='
grep -H -E '"--model",\s*"claude' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa errors tail ==='
tail -10 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== alejandro errors tail ==='
tail -10 /home/azureuser/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== ashley errors tail ==='
tail -10 /home/azureuser/.ashley-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== cameron errors tail ==='
tail -10 /home/azureuser/.cameron-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== jesus-reyes errors tail ==='
tail -10 /home/azureuser/.jesus-reyes-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== claude creds dir ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude/ 2>/dev/null
echo '===END==='
